title: Identity Management and Folder Assignments

posts.author: j.cevallos (Javier Cevallos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi !

Can anyone provide information into the state of API integration for user and group access rights. Are there any posted road maps for API features like this that I should be looking for?

Some initial questions, I am looking to automate some business process through the v2API.

  • Am I able to create and manage teams?
  • Am I able to manage team membership?
  • Am I able to manage board subscriptions for teams?
  • Am I able to manage dashboard subscriptions for teams so that dashboard are visible to members?

Thanks,

Javier

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
j.cevallos:
  • Am I able to create and manage teams?
  • Am I able to manage team membership?
  • Am I able to manage board subscriptions for teams?
  • Am I able to manage dashboard subscriptions for teams so that dashboard are visible to members?

Hi Javier, I know that a number of your requested features are plannend in API V2, but I do not see it on the roadmap.
